text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru now faces the<n>Kinko Sho,
where Silence Suzuka will<n>be competing as well.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Puffed up with pride,<n>Matikanefukukitaru declares
how<n>much she's changed compared to<n>last year.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is concerned by her<n>strange
mannerisms and how she<n>seems to believe that
her luck is<n>infallible.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a strange glint in her eye, she<n>heads to the
track.
